<p class="key-answer" data-question="Fingolimod 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Fingolimod</strong> 目前有 <strong>31 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Fingolimod 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Indicated as single disease modifying therapy in highly active relapsing remitting multiple sclerosis for the following groups of adult and paediatric patients aged 10 years and older: Patients with...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>relapsing-remitting multiple sclerosis（98.7%）</li>
<li>borderline ovarian serous tumor（94.9%）</li>
<li>ovarian papillary cystadenoma（94.6%）</li>
<li>malignant ovarian Brenner tumor（94.6%）</li>
<li>rete ovarii cystadenoma（94.6%）</li>
<li>serous neoplasm（94.3%）</li>
<li>ovarian mucinous cystadenofibroma（94.3%）</li>
<li>mucinous ovarian cystadenoma（94.2%）</li>
<li>ovarian benign neoplasm（94.2%）</li>
<li>ovarian surface papilloma（94.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
